source.source_policy: Store source URL, section title, task call, parameter record, retrieval date, and concise derived notes; do not vendor full CASA Guide pages.

customers.learner: Data plus concise tutorial docs, visible parameters, screenshots, and expected products for running the tutorial.
customers.regression: Reproducible correctness, performance, completeness, provenance, comparison, and human-review evidence.

inputs.source_note: The tutorial registry uses the 6.6.1 calibrated MS tarball because it is the current local parity artifact for the First Look at Imaging tutorial.

sections.title: Inspect calibrated MeasurementSet summary
sections.observable_result: Listobs-style MeasurementSet metadata for twhya_calibrated.ms, including fields, spectral windows, scans, antenna names, time range, and row counts.

sections.title: Plot calibrated MeasurementSet UV coverage
sections.observable_result: UV coverage plot for twhya_calibrated.ms with U and V axes in k-lambda, equal U/V aspect ratio, and field-colored tracks.

outputs.fallback: Use CASA Guide Figure 1 when local plotms is blocked by a headless DISPLAY.

sections.title: Plot amplitude vs UV distance by field
sections.observable_result: Iterated amplitude-vs-UV-distance panels by field; the Ceres panel shows decreasing amplitude with increasing UV distance.

sections.title: Create the dirty phase-calibrator image
sections.observable_result: Dirty MFS image of phase calibrator field 3, with a compact source near the image center and matching CASA image/residual/PSF/model/sumwt products.

sections.title: Clean the phase calibrator
sections.observable_result: Cleaned phase-calibrator image, model, residual, PSF, and sumwt products after mask-constrained Hogbom deconvolution.

sections.title: Split science target and average channels
sections.observable_result: A science-target-only MeasurementSet with 44,772 rows, one TW Hya field remapped to FIELD_ID 0, and 48 averaged output channels.

sections.title: Clean science target non-interactively
sections.observable_result: A cleaned science-target continuum image, residual, model, PSF, sumwt, and PB product generated from the smoothed TW Hya split MeasurementSet.

sections.title: Apply primary-beam correction to the cleaned science target
sections.observable_result: Primary-beam corrected science-target image made by dividing the cleaned image by the primary-beam response image.
